_comment: Side-step maneuver demo: zoom in on the lone Spearmen (seed 12345, ~500,300, facing south toward the enemy), select it, then right-click a short step to the right. Because the shift is small and sideways, the regiment SIDE-STEPS -- it shuffles right at a walk while holding its south-facing line, instead of wheeling to face the move and wheeling back. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd. World coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
